articles.title: The simple, spiritual living in Andhra’s Kurma Gramam village
articles.description: Nestled amidst the scenic hills of Hiramandalam in Andhra Pradesh, Kurma Gramam is a tiny hamlet, spread across 60 acres and inhabited by 17 families that stands in contrast to modern lifestyles. Cut off from the contemporary living, the village functions without electricity, mobile phones, internet connectivity or even LPG services. Life here moves at a slower pace, deeply rooted in simplicity and spiritual discipline, writes Harish Gilai

topStories.description: US President Donald Trump refuses to apologise for criticism of Pope Leo XIV. “There’s nothing to apologize for… He’s wrong,” Trump says speaking to reporters outside the Oval Office.

topStories.title: Laid-off product manager earns  ₹1.3 crore per month selling tacos, 'Pakistani-American street food'

topStories.title: Street takeover turns violent in LA after shooting erupts, four hospitalised: Reports
topStories.description: A street takeover in Los Angeles turned violent when a shooting erupted at the scene, and four people have been reportedly hospitalised for gunshot wounds, after the overnight spectacle that was caught on camera, Fox News reported Monday (local time).

dailyNews.description: The US military has the capability to mount a blockade of vessels moving in and out of the Gulf. The question is: to what end?

dailyNews.title: DoorDasher delivers to White House, joins Trump in talking to press
dailyNews.description: President Trump invited DoorDash delivery worker Sharon Simmons to talk about his "no tax on tips" policy.

dailyNews.title: Latest from the White House as Trump bashes Pope Leo, begins blockade on Iranian ports
dailyNews.description: President Trump's blockade of Iranian ports and partial blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is underway after peace talks with Iran broke down over the weekend. Meanwhile, Mr. Trump is continuing to bash Pope Leo over the pontiff's opposition to the war in Iran. CBS News' Eleanor Watson, Chris Livesay and Olivia Rinaldi have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump reacts to collapsed Iran talks and Pope Leo comments
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed reporters at the White House on Monday, taking questions about Iran and his criticisms of Pope Leo XIV. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi has the latest on President Trump's comments at an event on his policy to tax tips.

dailyNews.title: Trump faces backlash over post depicting him like Jesus
dailyNews.description: The image was deleted from President Trump's Truth Social account, but the president said it depicted him as a "doctor, making people better."

dailyNews.title: Trump deletes social media post with AI image depicting him as Jesus after backlash
dailyNews.description: President Trump deleted a social media post depicting him as Jesus Christ after receiving widespread backlash over the AI-generated image. CBS News' Weijia Jiang has more.

dailyNews.title: Strait of Hormuz blockade escalates tensions between U.S. and Iran
dailyNews.description: Tensions between the U.S. and Iran remain strained as President Trump said the U.S. military would blockade the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News contributor Elliot Ackerman, a former CIA officer and Marine Corps veteran, joins with more.

dailyNews.title: Trump receives backlash over AI image depicting him as Jesus after criticizing Pope Leo
dailyNews.description: President Trump received backlash over an AI image shared on his social media account that depicts Mr. Trump as Jesus Christ. The photo was posted after Mr. Trump criticized Pope Leo XIV. CBS News' Natalie Brand has more.

dailyNews.title: Meet Péter Magyar, the man replacing Viktor Orbán as Hungary's prime minister
dailyNews.description: President Trump has lost his biggest cheerleader in Europe, but he may find common ground with his new counterpart, Péter Magyar.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo says he has "no fear" after Trump slams the pontiff
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo XIV responded to President Trump's sharp criticisms, saying he has "no fear of the Trump administration." CBS News' Chris Livesay has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Iran Blockade Sets Up a Test of Which Side Can Endure More Pain
dailyNews.description: President Trump is trying to choke off the country’s lifeline with a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. But the Iranians are betting that his tolerance for political pain is limited.

dailyNews.title: To Open the Strait of Hormuz, Trump Wants to Blockade Iran. Experts Are Skeptical.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s announcement of a U.S. blockade was his latest effort to pressure Iran to negotiate after direct talks over the weekend did not yield an agreement.

dailyNews.title: Trump Takes Down Post Depicting Himself as a Jesus-Like Figure
dailyNews.description: The image, which President Trump shared on Truth Social shortly after criticizing Pope Leo, depicted him as a divine leader healing the sick.
